NOTIFICATIONS.ITEM-NOT-FOUND: Could not find the selected item.
NOTIFICATIONS.FOLDER-NOT-FOUND: Could not find the selected folder.
NOTIFICATIONS.FOLDER-WRONG-TYPE: Folder "{folderName}" is not an Item folder.
NOTIFICATIONS.FOLDER-EMPTY: Folder "{folderName}" has no items to export.
NOTIFICATIONS.COMPENDIUM-NOT-FOUND: Could not find the selected compendium.
NOTIFICATIONS.COMPENDIUM-WRONG-TYPE: Compendium "{packTitle}" is not an Item compendium.
NOTIFICATIONS.COMPENDIUM-EMPTY: Compendium "{packTitle}" has no items to export.
NOTIFICATIONS.TRAITS-NOT-FOUND: No trait descriptions were found in CONFIG.PF2E.traitsDescriptions.

EXPORT-TRAITS.NAME: Trait Export
EXPORT-TRAITS.LABEL: Open Exporter
EXPORT-TRAITS.HINT: Open the trait export dialog and export all PF2E trait descriptions as markdown.
EXPORT-TRAITS.TITLE: Export Traits
EXPORT-TRAITS.DESCRIPTION: Exports each PF2E trait description from CONFIG.PF2E.traitsDescriptions into its own markdown file inside a Traits folder.
